comment: 10 demo questions every ladder model answers, each in a fresh chat. 'thinking: false' appends the Qwen3 /no_think soft switch; the one thinking question showcases HermitUI's <think> rendering and the model's reasoning quality.

questions.text: Why is running an AI model locally in your own browser a nice thing to have? Answer with 3 short bullet points.
Explain to a non-technical friend, in one short paragraph, how a chat AI that runs entirely inside the browser protects your privacy compared to a cloud chatbot.
What is the capital of Australia, and why is it not Sydney or Melbourne? Answer in 2-3 sentences.
List the eight planets of our solar system in order from the Sun, then name the largest one.
Write a four-line rhyming poem about a hermit crab that finds a perfect new shell.
Write a friendly product announcement of at most 80 words for HermitUI, a privacy-first chat app that runs AI models entirely in your browser.
Anna is taller than Ben. Chris is shorter than Ben. Dana is taller than Anna. Who is the shortest and who is the tallest? Answer briefly.
Compute 17 × 23 step by step, then state the final answer.
Write a JavaScript function that reverses a string, in a code block, then explain it in one sentence.
Antworte auf Deutsch: Erkläre in zwei Sätzen, warum ein Einsiedlerkrebs ein passendes Maskottchen für eine private Chat-App ist.
